WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.label: 工作
WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.description: 机械将执行分配的工作.

WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.label: 充电
WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.description: 机械将寻找充电站并充电.

WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.label: 休眠
WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.description: 机械将立即进入休眠状态.
